'''Nirsh''' was a member of the [[BloodScar]]s on [[Gepparin]]. He was the bodyguard of [[the Commodore]].

When [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] visited the Commodore on [[Gepparin]], she threw Nirsh's [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] in the pool by using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. After that, his boss allowed Nirsh to get back his weapon.

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
